action_set_definitions.name: fetch_student_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state for a specific student, including mastery levels, engagement, and fatigue.

student_id.description: The unique identifier of the student (e.g., 'Leo').

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_topic_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves educational metadata for a specific topic, including its prerequisite dependencies and the expected cognitive load (fatigue increase) per lesson.

topic_id.description: The ID of the topic to investigate.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_lesson
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a learning session for a specific topic to increase student mastery. This action increases student fatigue.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_assessment
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a formal evaluation of the student's mastery for a specific topic. This is the only way to officially validate the task completion.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_behavioral_intervention
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the student's internal state to manage fatigue or engagement.

intervention_type.description: rest_break significantly reduces fatigue_index; motivation_boost increases engagement_level.

state_description.mastery_map: A dictionary where keys are topic IDs and values are floats (0.0 to 1.0) representing student mastery.
state_description.engagement_level: Current student motivation/focus level from 0.0 (stopped learning) to 1.0 (highly focused).
state_description.fatigue_index: Accumulated cognitive load from 0.0 to 1.0; higher values increase the probability of error.
state_description.attempt_history: A chronological list of previous lesson or quiz IDs completed in the current session.
